default_test_marker_exclusion: not auth_local_real and not auth_service_live and not auth_recovery_drill and not slow
known_limitations: ordinary CI still installs --all-groups --all-packages and does not yet trim heavy optional capability pulled in by the current root dev group
tool scripts are syntax-checked by check-tools, but repo-wide tool formatting/lint normalization is deferred
marker adoption is intentionally partial in QA0; unmarked stable tests still run under test-core
legacy p45-substrate-up/down env-file path join remains Windows-oriented; use p45-auth-compose-config for inspection
